Detailed Description

template<typename Stream>
struct sprite::visitors::StreamOut< Stream >

Implements operator<< for nodes.

Parameters:
stream The output stream.
first True if this is the outermost invocation (avoids surrounding the whole expression in parentheses.
node The head of the expression to print.

Definition at line 77 of file operators.hpp.

Member Function Documentation

template<typename Stream>
template<typename NodeType>
result_type sprite::visitors::StreamOut< Stream >::operator() (  Stream &  stream,
bool  first,
NodeType const &  node
)  const [inline]
 

Handles nodes without any value_type, such as user-defined constructorss and defined operations.

Definition at line 96 of file operators.hpp.

References sprite::Program::ctor_label, sprite::Program::oper_label, and sprite::visit().

Here is the call graph for this function:

template<typename Stream>
template<typename Payload>
enable_if<meta::has_value_type<Payload>, result_type>::type sprite::visitors::StreamOut< Stream >::operator() (  Stream &  stream,
bool  ,
Node_< Payload > const &  node
)  const [inline]
 

Handles built-in types, which define a value_type in the payload. For these, we don't print the constructor name, just the value instead.
